title: Foreign secretary concerned ministers not told of Mandelson vetting fears sooner
description: Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer is facing calls to resign over the scandal and will address MPs on Monday.

title: Iran live updates: Tehran reviewing US proposal as it reasserts control over strait
description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

title: Tear gas, pepper spray and arrests as protesters try to storm a Wisconsin beagle lab
description: Wisconsin animal rights activists were fired with tear gas and pepper spray after trying to gain entry into a beagle breeding and research facility on Saturday.

title: Three year old shoots two people during ‘Youth Turkey Hunt’ in Wisconsin
description: A man and his son were hospitalized after getting shot in the back, hands and head by a three-year-old boy during a youth hunting trip in Wisconsin.

title: Patel threatens to sue Atlantic over story alleging excessive drinking
description: FBI Director Kash Patel has threatened to sue the Atlantic over a recent story detailing alleged concerns in the bureau over his drinking and absences at work. The report, published on Friday, described a pattern of heavy drinking both in Washington, D.C., and Las Vegas, where Patel reportedly spends some of his weekends. Patel’s drinking […]

title: Bill Maher calls Eric Swalwell a ‘f–king creep,’ says he ‘never liked’ the disgraced Democrat
description: Maher's comments come as Swalwell battles a number of sexual misconduct and harassment allegations from five different women who recently came forward to recount their experiences.

title: Depleted Lakers take advantage of Kevin Durant-less Rockets in Game 1 victory
description: Deandre Ayton had 19 points and 11 rebounds for the fourth-seeded Lakers, who pulled off an impressive win without their top two scorers.

title: Knicks’ defense locked in to shut down Hawks in performance they can only hope to repeat
description: It was the key to this 113-102 victory, the Knicks ramping up their defensive intensity and shutting down Atlanta after halftime.

title: What travelers can do as the Iran war impacts flight costs and availability
description: Travelers are wondering how to plan their upcoming vacations as the cost and availability of flights are up in the air amid the war against Iran.
